chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-318 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of bail application 11-09-2023 Mr. Shahid Hussain Gopang, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G. ***** Applicant is called absent; however, his counsel submits that case has been disposed of on the basis of compromise and applicant has been acquitted. He has submitted case diary dated 21.06.2023. Accordingly, this bail application is dismissed as not pressed and surety is discharged, which be given to surety after proper verification, identification and as per rules. JUDGE Ahmad
